narrative:
Broadview Heights-01-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,162 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.3 percentage points.
